results.query: What are the main clinical features and phenotypes associated with RARS1 mutations?
results.description: Must identify HLD9 phenotype from real sources.
results.answer_preview: The main clinical features associated with RARS1 mutations include severe hypomyelination, nystagmus, and spasticity. This is clinically classified as Hypomyelinating Leukodystrophy 9 (HLD9).

citations.title: Bi-allelic Variants in RARS1 Cause a Syndrome of Severe Hypomyelination...
